mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job_posting WHERE job_posting_id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_resume (resume_id, job_posting_id, pdf_path, updated_at) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{jobPostingId}, #{pdfPath}, CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select: SELECT template_id FROM cover_letter_template ORDER BY is_active DESC, default_order ASC, template_id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic (job_resume_id, school_name, major, admission_date, graduation_date, gpa) VALUES (#{jobResumeId}, #{schoolName}, #{major}, #{admissionDate}, #{graduationDate}, #{gpa})
INSERT INTO certificate (job_resume_id, acquired_date, certificate_name, issuer) VALUES (#{jobResumeId}, #{acquiredDate}, #{certificateName}, #{issuer})
INSERT INTO cover_letter_item (job_resume_id, template_id, item_name, content, item_order) VALUES (#{jobResumeId}, #{templateId}, #{itemName}, #{content}, #{itemOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT jr.job_resume_id AS jobResumeId, jr.resume_id AS resumeId, jr.job_posting_id AS jobPostingId, jr.pdf_path AS pdfPath, jr.created_at AS createdAt, jp.company_name AS companyName, jp.job_category AS jobCategory FROM job_resume jr JOIN resume r ON r.resume_id = jr.resume_id LEFT JOIN job_posting jp ON jp.job_posting_id = jr.job_posting_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY jr.job_resume_id DESC
